description: Temporary allowlist for components that predate required co-located agent intent. Entries must only be removed, never added.

legacySummaries.component:ds-banner: Intent-colored message bar. Supports floating toast mode with auto-dismiss and fade-out animation.
legacySummaries.component:ds-card: Shared card chrome — width + matching min-height tokens, header (title + actions slot), and a flex body that fills leftover space. Compose from settings and data-viz cards.
legacySummaries.component:ds-card-data-viz-donut: Donut data-viz card on shared ds-card chrome — fill chart region, content-sized legend, header filter action, and chart↔legend hover sync.
legacySummaries.component:ds-card-setting: Settings page section shell composed on ds-card with view/edit header actions. Edit state is controlled by the parent.
legacySummaries.component:ds-modal: Dialog overlay with portal rendering, escape-to-close, backdrop click, focus management, and entry/exit animations.
legacySummaries.component:ds-pagination: Standalone page navigation with ellipsis for large ranges, sibling count control, and keyboard-accessible buttons.
legacySummaries.component:ds-table: Data table with CSS grid layout, sorting, pagination, loading skeleton, row selection, and custom cell rendering.
